rule: a session whose FIRST BAR closes at or after cutoff_epoch is SEALED; before it, EXPLORE. Keyed on the session's start so no session straddles the boundary, and every future session is automatically sealed.
declared_by: config/session_history.py SEALED_FROM - this file is the frozen receipt of that declaration; session_history/split.py verifies the two agree on every load
why_time_split: volatility clusters, so a random split leaks - a day in explore informs the day beside it in test. Time-forward is the only honest 'does this survive the future'.
